description:
Seasonal time system clock 不定時法時計 ウィジェット
Display and Japanese clock time (seasonal time) calculated by location  

* 和時計時刻(不定時法) - Japanese clock time (seasonal time)  
* 朔望 - Syzygy  
* 和風月名 - Traditional Japanese month names (Wafūgetsu-mei)   
* 日付 - Day
* 日干支 - Sexagenary cycle (Hinoeto) day 
* 二十四節気 - 24 solar terms (Nijūshi-sekki) 
* 雑節 - Miscellaneous seasonal observances (Zassetsu)  
* 和暦 - Japanese calendar year (Wareki) 
* 干支 - Sexagenary cycle (Eto) year 
* おやつ時通知 - Notice Oyatsu-doki
